steps.title: Read the endpoint values
steps.content: From the scatterplot, the recorded temperatures at the requested times are $(5,14)$ and $(7,24)$.

steps.title: Compute the average rate
steps.content:
Use the slope formula between those two points:
$$\frac{24-14}{7-5}=\frac{10}{2}=5$$
The answer is 5.
